signals.headline: Luka Dončić Confirmed Out Indefinitely with Grade 2 Hamstring Strain as Playoffs Begin | YES (Impacts Lakers Playoff Odd
signals.raw:
Luka Dončić Confirmed Out Indefinitely with Grade 2 Hamstring Strain as Playoffs Begin | YES (Impacts Lakers Playoff Odds and Flagg ROY Race) | HIGH confidence** [1]

Dončić's injury, suffered earlier in April, has no confirmed return timeline despite specialized treatment in Europe, severely weakening the Lakers' first-round matchup amid their reliance on LeBron James and absence of Austin Reaves
matched_markets: Will Vegas Golden Knights advance to Round 2 of the 2026 NHL Playoffs?

signals.headline: Cooper Flagg's Historic Rookie Performances Boost ROY Case Amid Adjusted Voting | YES (Favors Flagg Over Rivals) | HIGH
signals.raw:
Cooper Flagg's Historic Rookie Performances Boost ROY Case Amid Adjusted Voting | YES (Favors Flagg Over Rivals) | HIGH confidence** [1][2][3]

Flagg, with the Mavericks, just posted back-to-back 40+ point games (51 then 45 vs. Lakers), totaling 96 points—the first rookie since Allen Iverson (1997) with consecutive 40-point outings and matching Wilt Chamberlain's rare two-game rookie scoring feat.
matched_markets: Will Cooper Flagg win the 2025–26 NBA Rookie of the Year award?
